name: Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the mashed pumpkin, raisins, nuts, and vanilla to the creamed mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and baking powder.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
8. Dust with icing sugar, if desired.
